procedures.name: Electroconvulsive Therapy (ECT)
procedures.description: A psychiatric treatment where generalized seizures are electrically induced to manage refractory mental disorders.

procedures.name: Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS)
procedures.description: A neurosurgical procedure involving the implantation of a medical device that sends electrical impulses to specific targets in the brain.
